mobile.title: Event templates
mobile.safetyDescription: People, registrations, private answers, attendance, tickets, delivery history, federation identifiers and publication state are never copied.
mobile.loadFailedDescription: The template library could not be loaded. Try again.
mobile.emptyDescription: Save an event as a template on the web to build a reusable configuration library.
mobile.scheduleDescription: Review the title, time zone and future schedule. A fresh draft will be created.
mobile.validationDescription: Enter a title, time zone and valid future schedule.
mobile.previewFailedDescription: The server could not prepare the safe draft preview.
mobile.reviewDescription: Confirm the server checks before creating the draft.
mobile.readyDescription: The current version, safe fields, schedule and creation workflow were verified.
mobile.createdDescription: Review and publish it separately when it is ready.
mobile.createFailedDescription: The event draft could not be created. Try again.

checks.event_template_check_source_manage: You still have permission to manage the source event
checks.event_template_check_allowlist_exact: Only approved configuration fields are included
checks.event_template_check_private_records_ski: Private and operational records are excluded
checks.event_template_check_versioned_snapshot: The configuration is an immutable versioned snapshot
checks.event_template_check_version_current: The selected template version is current
checks.event_template_check_schedule_valid: The new schedule is valid and in the future
checks.event_template_check_federation_none: Federation is disabled for the new draft
checks.event_template_check_canonical_writer: The canonical event creation workflow will be used
